vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but shows significant degradation. P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) is present. P1 (String of Nickels) is present. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are in a state of severe decline or systemic loss.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Present, but showing signs of chlorosis.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No viable mint foliage visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf and rabbit anchor intact.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No distinct silver guest foliage identified.

plant_audit.P1: String of Nickels: Foliage is sparse and dull; growth is stagnant.
plant_audit.P2_P4: Black Pot: Contains only soil and debris; no active plant matter.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos: Single leaf remains; shows signs of necrotic edges.
plant_audit.P4_New: Intervention: Eggshell fragments present in soil, likely as a calcium supplement attempt.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp/dark; potential for overwatering or poor drainage.
biome_observations.fungal_presence: None visible, but soil surface appears compacted.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments observed in the black pot (P3/P4 area).

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_1: Gradual loss of turgor pressure in the Pothos leaf. The P2/P4 pot shows a complete disappearance of green matter.
temporal_deltas.T_minus_1_to_Current: The Pothos leaf has curled further. The soil surface in the black pot remains static with no new growth.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The Pothos (P3) is struggling with low light or root stress. The P2/P4 pot is effectively a dead zone. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at soil amendment that has not yielded visible results.
anomalies: Persistent necrotic leaf tissue on P3.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The Pothos (P3) is the only remaining specimen of note, and it is in poor health. The other pots are essentially empty of living flora, suggesting a failure in the maintenance cycle or environmental suitability. The eggshells indicate a desperate or experimental intervention that has not yet succeeded.
